title: Tauuni
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Tauuni''''' was a pair of [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]]. One of them contained [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] who had commence a reconnaissance mission against the [[Death Star II/Legends|Second Death Star]], the other contained [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. The freighters were held up by the [[Emancipator|''Accuser'']], which also bought the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] [[Grappler (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Grappler'']] to prevent them from leaving. When the Interdictor was driven out by Rebels in [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]] both the freighters, as well as all of the other ships made a run for their hyperspace junctions but were opened fired on by the ''Accuser''. Despite the pressure of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] both freighters supposedly reached [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
